change_summary: adjusted the root README workflow diagram into a two-row snake layout so the Mermaid flow reads more clearly in narrow markdown rendering
reworked the root README example workflow into a dedicated markdown section with a visual flow and short step-by-step guidance
rewrote the root README example workflow to describe the full engineering-memory cycle from project instantiation through ingestion, general updates, assisted outputs, and overview-driven maintenance
refined the root README human guide so it now explains how a systems engineer uses the workspace during development and maintenance
expanded the root README with a short human guide covering repository intent, common action types, and a simple usage workflow

updated the shared internal-docs skill so requirement guidance now matches the template contract for verification-prefixed fields, early-phase TBD verification values, and dated append-only reference plus follow-up fields
aligned workspace guidance and shared skills with the current project-template structure, fixed shared skill path examples, and refreshed the advertised shared-skill inventory
deleted `projects/test-project`, removed its workspace manifest entry, and removed the dashboard seed test tied to that disposable project
tightened workspace-root guidance so any ambiguity about the target project requires asking the user before answering or editing
copied the shared `internal-docs` skill into `agent/skills` and updated workspace guidance so the new shared skill is discoverable

reworked the shared execution dashboard so section tabs and project filtering sit at the top level, execution-only controls stay inside the execution view, and README files are excluded from dashboard documents
added a root-level `workspace_change_log` folder with JSON-first guidance so workspace changes outside individual projects have their own append-only trace record
